chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. S – 172 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case For hearing of main case 16.12.2024 Mr. Muhammad Nasir Malik, Advocate for the petitioner Mr. Shahryar Awan, Assistant Advocate General Sindh >>>>>..<<<<< Learned counsel for the petitioner under instructions does not press instant Constitutional Petition, which is dismissed as not pressed. Judge ARBROHI
